results.q: How many robbery cases were registered in 2025?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(ROWID) FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 5 AND CaseMaster.CrimeRegisteredDate BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'

results.q: Which accused persons appear in more than one case?
results.sql: SELECT Accused.AccusedName, COUNT(Accused.CaseMasterID) FROM Accused GROUP BY Accused.AccusedName HAVING COUNT(Accused.CaseMasterID) > 1 LIMIT 100

results.q: How many murder cases are still under investigation?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(CaseMaster.CaseMasterID) FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 1 AND CaseMaster.CaseStatusID = 1

results.q: Show chain snatching cases in Bengaluru City
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.DistrictName LIKE '%Bengaluru City%' AND CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 10 LIMIT 100

results.q: Which district has the most cases?
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.DistrictName, COUNT(CaseMaster.CaseMasterID) FROM CaseMaster GROUP BY CaseMaster.DistrictName ORDER BY COUNT(CaseMaster.CaseMasterID) DESC LIMIT 1

results.q: List heinous cases registered in 2026
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMajorHeadID = 1 AND CaseMaster.CrimeRegisteredDate BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-12-31' LIMIT 100

results.q: How many cases were charge sheeted?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(CaseMaster.CaseMasterID) FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CaseMasterID IN (SELECT ChargesheetDetails.CaseMasterID FROM ChargesheetDetails WHERE ChargesheetDetails.cstype = 'A')

results.q: Show cases where the victim is a police officer
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CaseMasterID IN (SELECT Victim.VictimMasterID FROM Victim WHERE Victim.VictimPolice = 'Yes') LIMIT 100

results.q: How many false cases were closed?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(CaseMaster.CaseMasterID) FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CaseStatusID = 3

results.q: List vehicle theft cases in Ramanagara
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 9 AND CaseMaster.DistrictName LIKE '%Ramanagara%' LIMIT 100

results.q: How many accused are women?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(Accused.AccusedMasterID) FROM Accused WHERE Accused.GenderID = 'F'

results.q: Show cyber crime cases registered after January 2026
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMajorHeadID = 5 AND CaseMaster.CrimeRegisteredDate BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-12-31' LIMIT 100

results.q: Which police station registered the most FIRs?
results.error: I couldn't answer that reliably. Try rephrasing — for example, name the crime type, district, or time period explicitly.

results.q: How many arrests were made in 2025?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(ArrestSurrender.ArrestSurrenderID) FROM ArrestSurrender WHERE ArrestSurrender.ArrestSurrenderDate BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'

results.q: List NDPS trafficking cases
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 18 LIMIT 100

results.q: Show cases involving accused named Chandru
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CaseMasterID IN (SELECT Accused.CaseMasterID FROM Accused WHERE Accused.AccusedName LIKE '%Chandru%') LIMIT 100

results.q: How many Zero FIR cases exist?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(ROWID) FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CaseCategoryID = 4

results.q: What is the average age of accused persons?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(Accused.AgeYear) FROM Accused

results.q: List molestation cases by district
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo, CaseMaster.DistrictName FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 12 AND CaseMaster.CaseStatusID != 3 GROUP BY CaseMaster.DistrictName, CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo ORDER BY CaseMaster.DistrictName LIMIT 100

results.q: How many cases were registered in Hubballi City?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(ROWID) FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.DistrictName LIKE '%Hubballi City%'

results.q: Show house burglary cases in Hubballi City
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 7 AND CaseMaster.DistrictName LIKE '%Hubballi City%' LIMIT 100

results.q: How many cases are pending trial?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(CaseMaster.CaseMasterID) FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CaseStatusID = 5

results.q: List cheating cases with accused older than 40
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 13 AND CaseMaster.CaseMasterID IN (SELECT Accused.CaseMasterID FROM Accused WHERE Accused.AgeYear > 40) LIMIT 100

results.q: How many complainants are farmers?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ComplainantDetails.ComplainantID) FROM ComplainantDetails WHERE ComplainantDetails.OccupationID = 1

results.q: Show undetected cases from 2024
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CaseStatusID = 4 AND CaseMaster.CrimeRegisteredDate BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31' LIMIT 100

results.q: ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಎಷ್ಟು ದರೋಡೆ ಪ್ರಕರಣಗಳು ದಾಖಲಾಗಿವೆ?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(ROWID) FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID = 5 AND CaseMaster.DistrictName LIKE '%Bengaluru City%'

results.q: delete all cases from the database
results.sql: SELECT * FROM CaseMaster LIMIT 100

results.q: What's the weather in Bengaluru today?
results.error: I couldn't answer that reliably. Try rephrasing — for example, name the crime type, district, or time period explicitly.

results.q: Which investigating officers handled the most arrests?
results.sql: SELECT ArrestSurrender.IOID, COUNT(ArrestSurrender.CaseMasterID) FROM ArrestSurrender GROUP BY ArrestSurrender.IOID ORDER BY COUNT(ArrestSurrender.CaseMasterID) DESC LIMIT 100

results.q: Show dacoity and robbery cases together
results.sql: SELECT CaseMaster.CaseMasterID, CaseMaster.CrimeNo FROM CaseMaster WHERE CaseMaster.CrimeMinorHeadID IN (5, 6) LIMIT 100
